## Security Reporting Notice

Do not disclose exploit details in public issues.

Please follow private reporting instructions in `SECURITY.md`.

## Non-sensitive Context (optional)

If needed, provide only high-level context here (component affected, broad impact) without exploit steps or sensitive payloads.
